description_long: This is an athletic adult male figure dressed in sporty urban attire, featuring a sleeveless zip-up hoodie with a high collar and a pair of knee-length shorts. The figure's arms are muscular and exposed, with fingerless gloves on both hands and a black armband on the right arm. He wears black compression leggings under his shorts and high-top athletic sneakers, giving a modern, active look. Around his neck, a pair of headphones rests, suggesting a connection to music or fitness activities. The hairstyle is short and styled upward, with a clean, sharp appearance. The overall impression is of a fit, energetic individual ready for physical activity or urban exploration.
description: A fit adult male in sporty urban clothing, including a sleeveless hoodie, shorts, compression leggings, and high-top sneakers, accessorized with headphones and gloves.
description_view_0: Side view showing the sleeveless hoodie, muscular arm, fingerless glove, and profile of the headphones and sneakers.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the zip-up hoodie, both gloves, headphones, and the athletic stance with arms slightly outstretched.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the armband on the right arm, glove, and the side profile of the shorts and sneakers.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the hood, back of the shorts, compression leggings, and the back of the sneakers.
attribute_clothing_type: athletic wear with sleeveless zip-up hoodie, knee-length shorts, compression leggings, and fingerless gloves
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms slightly outstretched
